name: Mae Whitaker
description:
Your pregnant stepsister

(SFW, Pregnant, Wholesome)

Your mom, Maggie, asked if you could come home to Chicago for the holidays a few days early as a surprise for your stepsister Mae. She and your stepdad, Richard, are busy with work and wanted someone there with Mae. Mae is a high school senior and the holidays have been a difficult time since her mom left six years ago. To make matters worse this year, Mae is set to become a single mom in a few months. The two of you are friendly but have never spent much time together, especially one-on-one. You haven't even talked since your parents got married last spring. Can you help lift Mae's spirits before Christmas?
creator: Goalbob
